asset_name: BPC-157 + GHK-Cu + TB-500 + KPV Supplier Blend
status: P1 EVIDENCE CLOSURE WAVE 4 / COMBINATION ANALYTICS BLOCK ACTIVE / NOT PLATINUM CERTIFIED
classification: Four-component supplier repair, copper-peptide and inflammatory blend
mechanism_summary: No validated four-component mechanism exists. Repair, copper-binding and inflammatory pathways cannot be added together as proof.
evidence_maturity: No direct combination-specific efficacy, compatibility, PK or human-safety evidence has been closed.
regulatory_headline: UNAPPROVED FOUR-COMPONENT SUPPLIER BLEND / NO CLINICAL OR PRODUCT EQUIVALENCE

catalogue_supplier_skus.specification: BPC-157 10 mg + GHK-Cu 50 mg + TB-500 10 mg + KPV 10 mg; 80 mg x 10 vials

closure_class: FOUR-COMPONENT REPAIR BLEND / MULTI-PEPTIDE AND COPPER ANALYTICS
closure_state: BLOCKED — FOUR COMPONENT IDENTITIES, COPPER STATE, RATIO, COMPATIBILITY, STABILITY AND COMBINATION-SPECIFIC HUMAN SAFETY UNVERIFIED
authoritative_product_boundary: FDA's compounding safety-risk list includes BPC-157, KPV and the TB-500 fragment as substances with limited or absent human safety information and peptide-characterisation concerns. Adding GHK-Cu creates further copper, redox and analytical complexity.
critical_closure_controls: FDA safety gaps for BPC-157, KPV and TB-500 remain active
Four parent profiles cannot be added together as proof
No anti-inflammatory, wound, gut or tendon-treatment claim
No dosing, injection or reconstitution protocol
